name: Ball Scooping Friends
short_description: Experience the thrill of a Japanese festival with a unique twist! This online co-op game combines the fun of "Ball Scooping" (like goldfish scooping, but with balls!) and "Shooting Gallery" games.
detailed_description:
For video creators and streamers
STP WORKS permits the use of our games for video distribution to YouTube and other sites, and monetization through video distribution platform partner programs.

Game Overview
Experience the thrill of a Japanese festival with a unique twist! This online co-op game combines the fun of "Ball Scooping" (like goldfish scooping, but with balls!) and "Shooting Gallery" games. Scoop up balls and launch them at prize targets to win a variety of goodies and items. The items you snag can boost your money, trigger special events, and more!

Multiplayer
Dive into the action with Quick Match, which automatically connects you to available games for spontaneous fun. Or, team up with your friends using Friend Match for a private party. Of course, solo play is also fully supported, so you can enjoy the game at your own pace. Up to 4 players can play together!

Leaderboards
Compete against other players on the leaderboards to see who can progress the furthest in events.

Cooperative Events
Take part in exciting co-op events like monster hunts and mini-games such as "Barrel Drop." Monsters scale in difficulty based on player strength, offering increasingly challenging encounters. The tougher the monster, the better the rewards!

Upgrades
Power up your gameplay with a wide range of upgrades! Unlock shotguns, gatling guns, expand your scooper's size, boost its durability, and much more.

Prizes
The more you collect a specific prize, the higher its level becomes, increasing the amount of money you earn from it.
